name: Fog Furry Jett
comment: ADJ Fog Furry Jett: Features:- 700W professional DMX vertical Fog Machine with 12x 3-Watt LEDs- High performance pump for optimum output- ADJ’s Electronic Thermo Sensing (ETS) technology- Automatic circuit cut-off to protect pump if fog fluid tank runs dry- Special heating element design that uses an oil type transmission pipeline system to minimize the possibility clogging- 3 Operational modes: Manual, Remote Control, or DMX Controlled- 5 DMX modes : 1, 2, 3, 5 or 7 DMX Channels- 4-button control panel & LCD display on rear panel- 3-pin DMX XLR In/Out connections- Convenient carrying handle- Low Fluid Indicator on rear- Warm-up time: 9 min- External fog fluid tank: 3 Liter- Fog Output: 20,000 (cu.ft/min)- Tank can be mounted to either front or rear so that the effect may be pointed up or down- Included Accessory: ADJ FFJPWR - wireless remote- Power Connection: IEC AC In- Safety Loop on board - Only use high quality, water-based fog fluid, for optimum result, use ADJ Fog Juice CO2- Light Source: 12x 3-Watt LEDs, (3 Red, 3 Green, 3 Blue & 3 Amber LEDs) - Heater: 700W- Voltage: AC 120V, 230 or 240 50/60Hz (non switching)- Power Consumption: 730W (Full on)- Dimensions (LxWxH): 397 x 302 x 191mm- Weight: 7.1 kg.
